name: Cherry Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cream-filled chocolate swiss roll into 1-inch rounds and arrange them in the bottom of a serving dish.
2. Drain the cherries and scatter over the top.
3. Pour over apple juice and brandy (if using).
4. Break the plain chocolate into pieces and stir into the hot custard until melted. Mix until smooth and pour over the cherries. Allow to cool completely.
5. Mix hot water and instant coffee granules until smooth. Whip the whipping cream until it holds its shape. Stir in the coffee mixture.
6. Spoon the whipped cream into a piping bag fitted with a large star nozzle. Pipe rosettes on top of the custard layer. Arrange chocolate shapes on top.
